caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacts San Juan with Moderate Winds
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing steady rainfall with a 100 percent chance of rain accompanied by moderate northeast winds sustained at 15 knots and wave heights reaching 5.1 feet with a 9-second swell period. Nearby St. Maarten reports slightly stronger winds at 17 knots but lower precipitation probability, indicating localized heavy rainfall as the primary concern for the eastern Caribbean ports today.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Affect Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing moderate southerly swells with wave heights reaching 4.6 feet and sustained winds around 10 knots. Rain probability is high at 83 percent, indicating likely wet conditions for the port throughout the day.
